Woolworths

Automate Match

Parameters

The following parameters will be taken into consideration. Each can be toggled off or on.

{{item.title}}

Students will be matched with their preferred ANZSCO Code Position Titles

Career Hive takes ANZSCO Codes from Student Onboarding & Employer Vacancies to match each other.

Students with avoided industries will be taken into consideration.

Example: Tracy is a vegan and has chosen to avoid working in industries that deal with animal products.

Override Distance Preference

A maximum distance will be set between the student and the vacancy’s location.

km

Set Percentage Match Minimum Threshold

%

How many maximum allocations can each student receive?

The top percentage matches will be chosen.

1 2 3 4 5

What is the maximum number of students per vacancy?

Caps the number of students per vacancy based on total vacancies.
Example: 8 vacancies & 1.5x limit = 12 students max

1.25x 1.5x 1.75x 2x 2.25x 2.5x 2.75x 3x per Vacancy
